summary: The video shows a highway scene with two lanes in each direction. A large orange truck is traveling in the left lane, while a dark-colored vehicle is stopped in the right lane. Trees flank both sides of the road.

events_timeline.event: A large orange truck travels steadily in the left lane.

uncertainties: The identity of the dark-colored vehicle in the right lane is unclear.

risk_assessment.why: There are no apparent collisions, near misses, or hazardous interactions between vehicles.
